methods.name: Neuromuscular Password Authentication
methods.description: Multifactor authentication method that combines a unique password entry method with biometric features. Users enter passwords by contracting finger muscles, recorded using high-density surface electromyography (HD-sEMG).
sources: @article{jiangNeuromuscularPasswordBasedUser2021,  title = {Neuromuscular {{Password-Based User Authentication}}},  author = {Jiang, Xinyu and Xu, Ke and Liu, Xiangyu and Dai, Chenyun and Clifton, David A. and Clancy, Edward A. and Akay, Metin and Chen, Wei},  year = {2021},  month = apr,  journal = {IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics},  volume = {17},  number = {4},  pages = {2641--2652},  issn = {1941-0050},  doi = {10.1109/TII.2020.3001612}}
